evidence: The paper uses Gini MDI via extended Boruta: "the total of hits stored for each feature (H j) is tested using a two-sided test of equality based on the binomial distribution." Conclusions focus on feature selection (relevant/irrelevant) via significance testing, not importance magnitude. External validation: "The performance of the models was measured in the test sample, through prediction error (PE), F1 score, sensitivity (S), and specificity (E)" with leave-one-out CV on real data. RWR ranking cited is network-based, independent of RF importance: "genes obtained from knowledge-slanted RF ranked better in RWR...with a median position ranging from 548 to 569 compared to 3820 from conventional RF."
